query_title: A Nightmare on Elm Street 3: Dream Warriors

recommendations.title: The Blob
recommendations.overview: In Arborville, California, three high school students try to protect their hometown from a gelatinous alien life form that engulfs everything it touches.

recommendations.title: I Am Wrath
recommendations.overview: A man is out for justice after a group of corrupt police officers are unable to catch his wife's killer.

recommendations.title: The Mask
recommendations.overview: Stanley Ipkiss, an insecure banker who has lost his zest for life stumbles upon an ancient mask, that turns him into a confident suave cartoon-like character who upsets his ordinary life.

recommendations.title: Junglee
recommendations.overview: A vet returns home to his father's elephant reserve where he encounters and fights an international poacher's racket.

recommendations.title: Eraser
recommendations.overview: A Witness Protection specialist becomes suspicious of his co-workers when dealing with a case involving high-tech weapons.

recommendations.title: Paradise City
recommendations.overview: Renegade bounty hunter Ryan Swan must carve his way through the Hawaiian crime world to wreak vengeance on the kingpin who murdered his father.

recommendations.title: The Scorpion King
recommendations.overview: In ancient Egypt, peasant Mathayus is hired to exact revenge on the powerful Memnon and the sorceress Cassandra, who are ready to overtake Balthazar's village. Amid betrayals, thieves, abductions and more, Mathayus strives to bring justice to his com

recommendations.title: A Nightmare on Elm Street 4: The Dream Master
recommendations.overview: Freddy Krueger returns once again to terrorize the dreams of the remaining Dream Warriors, as well as those of a young woman who may be able to defeat him for good.

recommendations.title: Five Nights at Freddy's
recommendations.overview: Recently fired and desperate for work, a troubled young man named Mike agrees to take a position as a night security guard at an abandoned theme restaurant: Freddy Fazbear's Pizzeria. But he soon discovers that nothing at Freddy's is what it seems.

recommendations.title: Bless the Child
recommendations.overview: When Maggie's sister Jenna saddles her with an autistic newborn named Cody she touches Maggie's heart and becomes the daughter she has always longed for. But six years later Jenna suddenly re-enters her life and, with her mysterious new husband, Eric
